prompt: On-call horror story from last night: db AND the queue broker were both down, but the status dashboard showed a board with exactly ONE tile on it — db, in red. api and cache (which were perfectly healthy and answering their probes!) vanished from the board entirely, and the queue outage was invisible until a customer told us. So the aggregator apparently reports at most one problem per refresh and throws away everything else it learned that cycle. When everything is green the board is complete, which is why we never caught this in staging. Code: statusboard.py. Repro: python3 test_statusboard.py. Fix the aggregator so the whole board survives a bad cycle; the test file stays as-is.
